# `manifest.json` — Full Field Reference

`manifest.json` configures everything about **how the app is built and packaged**: name,
icon, version, app IDs per platform, permission descriptions, launch screen, and
platform-specific options. Unlike `pages.json` (which is universal), it has a
platform-specific block per target.

`manifest.json` is required and lives at the project root (or `src/`).

## Top-level shape

```jsonc
{
  "name": "MyApp",                  // app display name
  "appid": "__UNI__XXXXXXX",        // DCloud appid (auto-generated by HBuilderX)
  "description": "",
  "versionName": "1.0.0",           // user-visible version
  "versionCode": "100",             // integer build number (Android, used by stores)
  "transformPx": false,             // legacy rpx→px auto-scale flag
  "app-plus": { /* App (iOS/Android) config */ },
  "mp-weixin": { /* WeChat MP config */ },
  "mp-alipay": { /* Alipay MP config */ },
  "mp-baidu":   { /* Baidu MP config */ },
  "mp-toutiao": { /* ByteDance MP config */ },
  "mp-qq":      { /* QQ MP config */ },
  "mp-kuaishou":{ /* Kuaishou MP config */ },
  "h5": { /* H5 config */ },
  "quickapp": { /* Quick App config */ }
}
```

## Top-level keys

| Key | Notes |
|---|---|
| `name` | Display name (shown on home screen, in app store, on tab bar fallback title). |
| `appid` | DCloud appid. Auto-generated. Same value used for all platforms unless you override per-platform. |
| `versionName` | Semantic version string shown to users. |
| `versionCode` | Build number — must increase per upload. Required by Android stores. |
| `transformPx` | Legacy: if `true`, `rpx` is auto-converted; almost never set in Vue 3 projects. |
| `app-plus` | App-platform (iOS, Android) build options. |
| `mp-*` | One block per mini-program platform. The MP-specific `appid` lives here, not at the top. |
| `h5` | H5 build options. |
| `quickapp` | Quick App (legacy). |

## `app-plus` — iOS / Android (App)

```jsonc
"app-plus": {
  "usingComponents": true,
  "nvueStyleCompiler": "uni-app",
  "compilerVersion": 3,
  "splashscreen": {
    "alwaysShowBeforeRender": true,
    "waiting": true,
    "autoclose": true,
    "delay": 0
  },
  "modules": {                       // native modules to bundle
    "Push": { "ulappid": "your-unipush-appid" },
    "OAuth": {},
    "Share": {},
    "VideoPlayer": {}
  },
  "distribute": {
    "android": {
      "permissions": [
        "<uses-permission android:name=\"android.permission.INTERNET\"/>",
        "<uses-permission android:name=\"android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION\"/>"
      ],
      "minSdkVersion": 21,
      "targetSdkVersion": 30,
      "abiFilters": ["armeabi-v7a", "arm64-v8a"]
    },
    "ios": {
      "dSYMs": false,
      "idfa": false,
      "privacyDescription": {
        "NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription": "用于显示附近的店铺",
        "NSCameraUsageDescription": "用于拍摄头像"
      }
    },
    "icons": {
      "android": {
        "hdpi":   "static/icons/72x72.png",
        "xhdpi":  "static/icons/96x96.png",
        "xxhdpi": "static/icons/144x144.png",
        "xxxhdpi":"static/icons/192x192.png"
      },
      "ios": {
        "app@2x":  "static/icons/120x120.png",
        "app@3x":  "static/icons/180x180.png"
      }
    },
    "splashscreen": {
      "androidStyle": "common",
      "iosStyle": "common",
      "android": {
        "hdpi":    "static/splash/480x800.png",
        "xhdpi":   "static/splash/720x1280.png",
        "xxhdpi":  "static/splash/960x1600.png",
        "xxxhdpi": "static/splash/1280x1920.png"
      },
      "ios": {
        "iphonex": "static/splash/1125x2436.png"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

Critical keys:

- **`modules`** — opt-in to native modules. Adding `Push` enables uni-push; `Share` adds
  system share; etc. Each has its own options.
- **`distribute.android.permissions`** — list of Android permissions. Without these, your
  `uni.getLocation`, `uni.scanCode`, etc. will fail at runtime with permission errors.
- **`distribute.ios.privacyDescription`** — **required by App Store review**. Every iOS
  permission your app requests (location, camera, photos, etc.) needs a `*UsageDescription`
  string here.
- **`icons` and `splashscreen`** — path to PNG assets. Place them in `static/`.

## `mp-weixin` — WeChat MP

```jsonc
"mp-weixin": {
  "appid": "wx1234567890abcdef",
  "setting": {
    "urlCheck": false,            // disable server domain HTTPS check (dev only)
    "es6": true,
    "postcss": true,
    "minified": true
  },
  "usingComponents": true,
  "permission": {
    "scope.userLocation": {
      "desc": "用于显示附近的店铺"
    },
    "scope.address": {
      "desc": "用于收货地址"
    }
  },
  "requiredPrivateInfos": ["getLocation", "chooseLocation"],
  "lazyCodeLoading": {
    "current": -1,                 // -1 = disable lazy code loading
    "list": ["pages/index/index"]  // pages to lazy-load
  }
}
```

- **`appid`** — your WeChat MP appid from `https://mp.weixin.qq.com`. **Different** from
  the DCloud `appid` at the top of the file.
- **`setting.urlCheck: false`** — set to `true` in production. Disable for local dev
  against non-HTTPS backends.
- **`permission`** — every `scope.*` your app uses must have a `desc`. WeChat shows this
  to the user.
- **`requiredPrivateInfos`** — WeChat added this in 2022 for APIs that handle personal
  info. `getLocation` and `chooseLocation` must be declared or the call will fail.
- **`lazyCodeLoading`** — splits the code. See `uniapp-performance`.

## `h5` — H5

```jsonc
"h5": {
  "title": "MyApp",
  "router": {
    "mode": "history",            // "hash" or "history"
    "base": "/"
  },
  "publicPath": "/",
  "devServer": {
    "port": 8080,
    "https": false,
    "proxy": {
      "/api": {
        "target": "http://localhost:3000",
        "changeOrigin": true,
        "secure": false
      }
    }
  },
  "sdkConfigs": {}
}
```

- **`router.mode`** — `history` needs server-side rewrite of unknown paths back to
  `index.html`; `hash` works without server config.
- **`devServer.proxy`** — proxies `/api` to your backend during dev (uses vite/webpack
  dev server under the hood). Don't ship this for production; configure your reverse proxy
  instead.

## `mp-alipay`, `mp-baidu`, `mp-toutiao`, `mp-qq`, `mp-kuaishou`

Same shape as `mp-weixin`. Each has its own `appid` and platform-specific quirks. The
biggest difference from WeChat:

- **Alipay**: stricter ES syntax; some async patterns behave differently.
- **Baidu**: limited storage quota; some H5-style APIs return slightly different shapes.
- **ByteDance (Toutiao/Douyin)**: separate "appid" for Toutiao vs Douyin, even though
  they're under the same "ByteDance MP" — set in `mp-toutiao.appid`.
- **QQ**: similar to WeChat, but with a different `appid` and slightly different
  permission scope names.

For each, the agent should **always look up the latest spec** — these platforms change
without warning.

## Common mistakes

1. **Confusing `appid` (DCloud) with `appid` (WeChat MP).** Top-level is DCloud's;
   `mp-weixin.appid` is the WeChat one. They are completely separate registrations.
2. **Forgetting `permission.scope.*.desc`.** WeChat silently rejects auth scopes with no
   description.
3. **Forgetting iOS `privacyDescription`.** App Store rejects the binary.
4. **Adding Android permissions that you don't actually use.** Some stores will pull the
   app for over-requesting.
5. **`urlCheck: false` left in production.** Disable the HTTPS check for the server
   domain at WeChat's MP admin, not in code; let `urlCheck` stay `true` in shipped builds.
6. **Same `app-plus.modules` config across builds.** `OAuth` and `Payment` modules add
   significant binary size — only include what you use.

- H5-specific: https://uniapp.dcloud.net.cn/tutorial/run-h5.html
